title: Dash mace
description: Gives a mace that will let the player dash through the sky!
body:
The Dash Mace is a powerful mace designed to enhance mobility and aggression in combat. When right-clicked, it propels the player forward 6 blocks instantly, allowing them to close distance quickly, escape danger, or land hits on targets just out of melee range. This ability makes it especially useful in PvP situations, where positioning and timing are everything. The Dash Mace adds a dynamic layer to combat, encouraging fast-paced engagements and quick decision-making.

To keep the gameplay balanced, the dash ability comes with a 10-second cooldown, preventing constant use while still allowing players to use it frequently enough to stay mobile and aggressive. Players can obtain the Dash Mace using the /dashmace command, making it easy to integrate into events, kits, or special loot systems.

Whether you're chasing down a fleeing enemy, dodging incoming attacks, or launching into battle with a surprise burst of speed, the Dash Mace gives players a tactical edge and opens up creative combat possibilities. It's an excellent addition to any PvP arena, RPG server, or SMP gameplay experience where combat depth and fluidity matter.
